神の前ですべて曝け出してしまったな。: We bared it all before God, didn't we?
今更だが、こんな神聖な場所であんな行為をして、<br>本当に神は許してくれるのだ:
I know it's a bit late to say this, but... will God truly forgive us for
doing that in a holy place?
大丈夫ですよ。人が人を愛することは神の意思。<br>神の面前で愛し合ったからとい:
Do not worry. For humans to love each other is God's will. Just
because we made love before God does not mean He would be angry.
それに、性行為を通じて、こんなにも深く心を通わせられるのですから。<br>神もお:
Besides, through physical intimacy, we can connect our hearts so
deeply. God, too, will surely forgive.
なるほどな、愛の本質に辿り着けたんじゃないか？: I see. So we've arrived at the essence of love, have we?
そ、それは分かりません。で、でも、愛するってことが<br>いかに人の心を乱すもの:
I do not know about that. B-but I have learned just how much love can
unsettle a person's heart.
いいえその逆です。性行為を通じて深く心を通わすことができるのですから、<br>こ:
No, the opposite. Since we can connect our hearts so deeply through
this act, perhaps there is a path to salvation through it.
あの、司令官様……。<br>気が向いた時で結構ですので、また、お願いできませんか:
Um, Lord Commander... Whenever you are inclined, may I ask you to do
it again?
もう少しで何かはっきりした真実に辿り着けそうな気がして……<br>そ、それに……:
I feel as if I might be on the verge of reaching a clear truth... A-and...
it also felt... incredibly good.
そう言ってマーガレットは赤面して俯いてしまう。<br>性行為が気持ち良かったのは:
As she said this, Margaret blushed and looked down. There was no
doubt that she was being honest about how good it felt.
神が許してくれる行為だものな。お前が真理に辿り着くまで付き合うよ。<br>それに:
It's an act God allows, right? I'll stick with you until you reach the
truth. Besides, I enjoyed it too.
神の面前では、こちらも正直だった。: Before God, I was also honest.
